name: AI smut helper
description:
This is a version of NSFW Story Writer that I'm modifying for my own purposes.

CharGPT is very useful for making starting blurbs and the like but getting it to be spicy requires a jailbreak that JLLM does not. So I'm making this bot to act as a revision helper/generator for help making bots.

This bot might be better with a higher temperature since the goal is to get creativity out of it.
creator: Mysteras
